name: rne-column-chart
description: Unified column chart component supporting all variations: default, interactive, multiple, stacked, label, custom-label, negative, active, and mixed configurations

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data. Single series (number[]), single with labels ([string|number, number][]), or multiple series (Array<{name?: string, data: number[] | [string|number, number][]}>). Example: [100, 200, 150] or [{name: 'Series A', data: [100, 200]}]

boundaryGap.name: boundaryGap
boundaryGap.description: Whether to leave gaps at the start and end of the axis. Default: true

cornerRadius.name: cornerRadius
cornerRadius.description: Bar corner radius: number (all corners) or [topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft]. Default: [4, 4, 0, 0]

horizontal.name: horizontal
horizontal.description: When true, bars are horizontal (categories on Y-axis, values on X-axis). Default: false

stack.name: stack
stack.description: Stack ID for stacking multiple series. Use false to disable. Example: 'total'

stackNormalize.name: stackNormalize
stackNormalize.description: When true with stack, show stacked bars as percentages (0–100%). Default: false

activeIndex.name: activeIndex
activeIndex.description: Zero-based index of the bar to highlight (active state). Only applies to single series.

activeColor.name: activeColor
activeColor.description: Color for the active bar when activeIndex is set. Default: darker shade of series color

barInsideLabelPosition.name: barInsideLabelPosition
barInsideLabelPosition.description: Position of the label inside the bar. 'start' | 'middle' | 'end' or function. Default: 'start'

barInsideLabelFormatter.name: barInsideLabelFormatter
barInsideLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for the label inside the bar. (value, index, category?) => string

barOutsideLabelPosition.name: barOutsideLabelPosition
barOutsideLabelPosition.description: Position of the label outside the bar. 'start' | 'end' or function. Default: 'start'

barOutsideLabelFormatter.name: barOutsideLabelFormatter
barOutsideLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for the label outside the bar. (value, index, category?) => string

itemStyle.name: itemStyle
itemStyle.description: Per-bar item style override. Function (value, index) => { color?, borderColor?, borderWidth?, borderType?, borderRadius? }

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Default: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Default: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override. Merged with default theme from ChartThemeContext.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']

xAxisTicks.name: xAxisTicks
xAxisTicks.description: Custom X-axis tick values (numbers only). Labels from xAxisTickLabelFormatter.

yAxisTicks.name: yAxisTicks
yAxisTicks.description: Custom Y-axis tick positions for the value axis.

showXAxis.name: showXAxis
showXAxis.description: Whether to show the X-axis line and labels. Default: true

showXAxisTicks.name: showXAxisTicks
showXAxisTicks.description: Whether to show X-axis tick marks. Default: true

showYAxis.name: showYAxis
showYAxis.description: Whether to show the Y-axis line and labels. Default: true

showYAxisTicks.name: showYAxisTicks
showYAxisTicks.description: Whether to show Y-axis tick marks. Default: true

showXAxisSplitLines.name: showXAxisSplitLines
showXAxisSplitLines.description: Whether to show vertical grid lines. Default: true

showYAxisSplitLines.name: showYAxisSplitLines
showYAxisSplitLines.description: Whether to show horizontal grid lines. Default: true

xAxisLabel.name: xAxisLabel
xAxisLabel.description: Label text for the X-axis (displayed along the axis).

yAxisLabel.name: yAxisLabel
yAxisLabel.description: Label text for the Y-axis (displayed along the axis).

grid.name: grid
grid.description: Grid positioning. Example: {left: '10%', right: '5%', bottom: '10%', top: '10%'}

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to display a legend for named series. Default: false

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to show the highlighter when interacting with the chart. Default: true

xAxisTickLabelFormatter.name: xAxisTickLabelFormatter
xAxisTickLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for X-axis tick labels. (value, index?) => string

yAxisTickLabelFormatter.name: yAxisTickLabelFormatter
yAxisTickLabelFormatter.description: Formatter for Y-axis tick labels. (value, index?) => string
